calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Appointment Of Trustee

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Steele, via Zoom videoconference, for and with Matthew Woods, in court, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court and parties discuss counsel's intent to serve as Temporary Trustee while the parties continue to search for a Successor Trustee. The court confirms with the Petitioner that they agree that their attorney serve as Temporary Trustee and that they waive the bond should the court decide to appoint her in that capacity. At the conclusion of discussion, the court states that it feels comfortable appointing Anne Steele as Temporary Trustee. A Status of petition for appointment of a general successor trustee shall be set for Aug-10-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204. The Temporary appointment shall expire on Aug-10-2026.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
